song.title: For the Bread and For the Wine
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) For the bread and for the wine, For the pledge that seals Him mine, For the words of love divine, We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V2] 2) Only bread and only wine, Yet to faith, the solemn sign Of the heav’nly and divine! We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V3] 3) For the words that turn our eye To the cross of Calvary, Bidding us in faith draw nigh, We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V4] 4) For the words That fragrance breathe These plain symbols underneath, Words that His own peace bequeath, We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V5] 5) For Thy words in Spirit shown, For Thy will to us made known, “Do ye this until I come,” We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V6] 6) Till He come we take the bread, Type of Him on whom we feed, Him who liveth and was dead! We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V7] 7) Till He come we take the cup; As we at His table sup, Eye and heart are lifted up! We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
[V8] 8) For that coming, here foreshown, For that day to man unknown, For the glory and the throne, We give Thee thanks, O Lord.
song.author: Horatious Bonar
